name: Grapple Lab — player-initiated Grapple (D-ACT-2)
description: Bench for the new player Grapple action. Thorin (Fighter, strong Athletics) and Valeria step up to grapple. Open the radial Tactics popup and pick Grapple, then click an adjacent enemy: a contested Athletics check vs the target's Athletics/Acrobatics. On success the target is GRAPPLED (speed 0) until it spends its action to Escape (contesting Thorin's Athletics) or Thorin is downed. Grab a Goblin to hold it; try the Ogre too — it's only Large (one size up), so still grappleable. To see the size cap, a grapple needs a target >1 size larger than the grappler (none here is that big vs a Medium hero — that branch is covered by tests).
